description: Content update introducing Barbarian bundle, Crystal League scheduling changes, and minor balance adjustments.

sections.heading: Barbarian Bundle Now Available
sections.description: New cosmetic bundle added to the in-game shop.
sections.searchable_text: barbarian bundle war beast direwolf skin avatar

sections.heading: Crystal League Changes
sections.description: Adjustments to match scheduling and rewards.
items: Level 1 and 2 20v20 matches now occur 6 times daily
No-shows now still grant Season Points for 5v5 and 20v20
sections.searchable_text: crystal league schedule 20v20 season points no show

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Razor Cut cooldown reduction now works correctly
Circle of Life correctly roots mounted targets with sufficient stacks
Emergency Shield can now be purged
Various graphical, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes razor cut circle of life emergency shield purge
